{% extends 'layouts/admin_base.html' %} {% from "components/card.html" import card, card_header, card_title, card_description, card_content, card_footer %} {% from "components/page_header.html" import page_header %} {% from "components/data_card.html" import data_card %} {% from "components/status_badge.html" import status_badge %} {% from "components/workbench_table.html" import workbench_table %} {% from "components/modal.html" import modal %} {% block title %}Vendor Catalogue{% endblock %} {% block extra_head_js %} {% endblock %} {% block content %}
{{ page_header( title='Vendor Catalogue', description='Manage and explore your vendor ecosystem', breadcrumbs=[ {'label': 'Dashboard', 'href': url_for('main.index')}, {'label': 'Vendor Catalogue'} ], actions=[ {'text': 'Add Vendor', 'icon': 'plus', 'onclick': 'Platform.modal.open("create-vendor")', 'variant': 'default'}, {'text': 'Vendor Options Analysis', 'icon': 'sparkles', 'href': url_for('application_mgmt.vendor_analysis_list'), 'variant': 'outline'} ] ) }} {# Metrics Cards #}
{{ data_card(icon='building', icon_color='blue', value=stats.total|default(0), label='Total Vendors', subtitle='In vendor catalogue') }} {{ data_card(icon='check-circle', icon_color='green', value=stats.active|default(0), label='Active Vendors', subtitle=(((stats.active / stats.total) * 100)|round(0)|string ~ '% of total') if stats.total|default(0) > 0 else '0% of total') }} {{ data_card(icon='star', icon_color='purple', value=stats.strategic|default(0), label='Strategic Vendors', subtitle='High-value partnerships') }} {{ data_card(icon='package', icon_color='amber', value=stats.total_products|default(0), label='Product Portfolio', subtitle='Across all vendors') }} {# Portfolio ACV card #} {% if stats.total_acv|default(0) > 1000000 %} {% set acv_display = '$' ~ ('%.1f'|format(stats.total_acv / 1000000)) ~ 'M' %} {% elif stats.total_acv|default(0) > 1000 %} {% set acv_display = '$' ~ ('%.0f'|format(stats.total_acv / 1000)) ~ 'K' %} {% elif stats.total_acv|default(0) > 0 %} {% set acv_display = '$' ~ ('%.0f'|format(stats.total_acv)) %} {% else %} {% set acv_display = '—' %} {% endif %} {{ data_card(icon='banknote', icon_color='cyan', value=acv_display, label='Portfolio ACV', subtitle='Contracted + deployed ACV') }} {# Renewals due card #} {{ data_card(icon='calendar-clock', icon_color='amber' if stats.renewals_due|default(0) > 0 else 'gray', value=stats.renewals_due|default(0), label='Renewals Due (90d)', subtitle='Contracts expiring within 90 days') }}
{# Main layout: table + side panel #}
{# LEFT: Table Card — uses workbench_table macro #}
{% call workbench_table( columns=[ {'key': 'row_number', 'label': '#'}, {'key': 'name', 'label': 'Vendor', 'sortable': true}, {'key': 'vendor_type', 'label': 'Type'}, {'key': 'products_count', 'label': 'Products'}, {'key': 'enterprise_readiness_score', 'label': 'Readiness'}, {'key': 'status', 'label': 'Status'}, {'key': 'contract_status', 'label': 'Contract'}, {'key': 'mcda_score', 'label': 'Score'}, {'label': 'Actions', 'align': 'right'}, ], filters=[ {'key': 'vendor_type', 'label': 'Types', 'options': [ {'value': 'Cloud', 'label': 'Cloud'}, {'value': 'Enterprise', 'label': 'Enterprise'}, {'value': 'Hybrid', 'label': 'Hybrid'}, ]}, {'key': 'contract_status', 'label': 'Statuses', 'options': [ {'value': 'catalog', 'label': 'Catalog'}, {'value': 'contracted', 'label': 'Contracted'}, {'value': 'deployed', 'label': 'Deployed'}, {'value': 'inactive', 'label': 'Inactive'}, ]}, ], selectable=true, search_placeholder='Search vendors...', empty_icon='building', empty_message='No vendors found', empty_description='Try adjusting your search or filters', per_page_default=25 ) %} {# ── Page-specific cell templates (repeated per row by Alpine x-for) ── #}
{% endcall %}
{# RIGHT: Products side panel — hidden until a vendor is clicked #}
{# Edit Vendor modal #} {% call modal(id='edit-vendor-modal', title='Edit Vendor', size='lg') %}
{% endcall %} {# Bulk delete confirm modal #} {% call modal(id='bulk-delete-confirm-modal', title='Delete Vendors?', size='sm') %}

This will permanently delete the selected vendors and cannot be undone. Type DELETE to confirm.

{% endcall %} {# Create Vendor Modal #} {% call modal(id='create-vendor', title='New Vendor', description='Add a new vendor to the catalogue', size='lg') %}
{% endcall %} {% include 'components/unified_mapping_modal.html' %}
{% endblock %}
